diagrams.title: Max Heap Array Representation
diagrams.description: Shows a complete binary tree (max-heap) with its corresponding array representation, illustrating parent-child relationships and indices
elements: Left child 30 at index 1, Right child 20 at index 2
Children of 30: 15 at index 3, 10 at index 4
Children of 20: 8 at index 5, 7 at index 6
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how heaps are stored in arrays and the relationship between tree structure and array indices

diagrams.title: Heap Operations Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing Insert (percolate up) and Extract-Max (percolate down) operations in a max-heap
elements: Insert: Add to end → Compare with parent → Swap if needed → Repeat until root or parent >= child
Extract-Max: Remove root → Move last to root → Compare with children → Swap with larger child → Repeat until heap property satisfied
diagrams.purpose: Understand the step-by-step process of the two main heap operations
